form.formComment: Last start was seventh after being driven well back, behind Rollwitharty at Launceston over 1680m in a NR 50 to 57 on March 29 at $2.60. Raced better the start before that with a good run despite getting well back, when 3rd (Fr6) over 2090m at this track, beaten 9 m by Mary Mourne (2:33.30) in NR 50 to 56 on March 18 at $20. Draws the pegs and expected to go well.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Failed to secure clear running and was not fully tested.
Out of position at the start. Tyre deflated over the final 400m.

form.formComment: Well beaten last start by Ashante Queen, who he meets again; was restrained, when 16 metres seventh at this track over 1609m in a NR 56 to 60 race on April 3. Tested again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Stood flat footed and began slowly. Over-raced after catching the field.

form.formComment: Four-year-old mare is racing in fine form. Won her last two outings at this track. Last start won by 1.4 m when driven back in the field, (Fr6) held up early, at this track (2:36.20) beating Mcmayhem in 3yo+ NMT 4 LTW's on April 3 at $2.30. Great chance of another win.

form.formComment: Last start posted a big 7 m win (FT Fr3) at Launceston (2:45.10) beating Colby Sanz in NR 60 or better on March 29 at $5.50. In winning form and has to be included.
